$comment: 非默 aid resource directory. Every entry must be human-verified before listing (call the number, confirm on sourceUrl). sourceUrl = official page that publishes this contact info; the weekly CI job re-checks the number still appears there. null sourceUrl = cannot auto-verify, needs one. verifiedAt = YYYY-MM of last human verification.

resources.name: 全国统一心理援助热线
resources.description: 国家卫生健康委统一号码。2025年起全国推广，用于心理咨询、疏导与危机干预
resources.descriptionEn: National Health Commission unified hotline for mental health consultation, support, and crisis intervention

resources.name: 北京市心理援助热线
resources.description: 由北京心理危机研究与干预中心、北京回龙观医院运营的官方心理援助热线
resources.descriptionEn: Official hotline run by the Beijing Psychological Crisis Research and Intervention Center and Beijing Huilongguan Hospital
resources.location: 北京回龙观医院 / 北京

resources.name: 上海市心理热线
resources.description: 上海市官方心理热线，7×24小时接听；自2025年起同步接入全国12356
resources.descriptionEn: Official Shanghai hotline, staffed 24/7; connected to the national 12356 system since 2025
resources.location: 上海市精神卫生中心 / 上海

resources.name: 广州心理援助热线
resources.description: 广州市官方心理援助热线，24小时免费；自2025年起与全国12356并轨运行
resources.descriptionEn: Official Guangzhou hotline, free 24/7; merged with the national 12356 system in 2025

resources.name: 12338全国妇女维权服务热线
resources.description: 全国妇联体系妇女维权服务热线，可求助家庭暴力、骚扰、歧视与未成年人权益问题
resources.descriptionEn: Women's rights hotline in the All-China Women's Federation system for domestic violence, harassment, discrimination, and child protection issues.

resources.name: 全国法律援助热线
resources.description: 司法部免费法律咨询热线，可申请指派法律援助律师，覆盖家暴、离婚、人身安全令
resources.descriptionEn: Ministry of Justice free legal hotline. Can request a free appointed lawyer for DV, divorce, and protective orders.

resources.name: 北京源众家庭与社区发展服务中心
resources.nameEn: Beijing Yuanzhong Family & Community Development Center
resources.description: 专注性别暴力受害者支持，提供法律援助、心理疏导及个案陪伴服务。服务全国
resources.descriptionEn: Focused on gender-based violence. Legal aid, counseling, and individual case support. Serves nationwide.

resources.name: 番禺区妇联“阳光心晴”心声热线
resources.description: 番禺区妇联公开热线，可转介婚姻家事纠纷、家庭暴力、妇女儿童维权与心理支持资源
resources.descriptionEn: Official Panyu Women's Federation hotline for family disputes, domestic violence, women's and children's rights, and referral support.

resources.name: 上海市法律援助中心
resources.description: 上海市官方法律援助机构。办理窗口电话为 021-33258152，24小时法律咨询可另拨 12348
resources.descriptionEn: Shanghai official legal aid center. Window phone is 021-33258152; for 24/7 legal consultation users can also call 12348.
resources.location: 上海市徐汇区中山西路1538号1002室
resources.locationEn: Room 1002, 1538 Zhongshan West Rd, Xuhui, Shanghai

resources.name: 深圳12338妇女儿童维权服务
resources.description: 深圳市妇联妇儿维权服务。官方公开信息显示，原“12338”渠道已并入12345市民热线，实现24小时响应
resources.descriptionEn: Women's Federation rights service in Shenzhen. Official notices say the original 12338 channel has been merged into the 12345 city hotline for 24-hour response.
